title: pelargonium capillare
intro: Pelargonium capillare, also known as a type of South African pelargonium plant, is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of various flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pelargonium capillare include its potential to help reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Pelargonium capillare is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is valued for its calming and soothing effects.
